projects.recommendation: Commission a usability study before finalising the information architecture.
projects.decision: APPROVED WITH CONDITIONS - Project approved to proceed to Phase 1, subject to: security audit sign-off by the CISO and legal review of data residency requirements. Budget of EUR 110,000 confirmed.
action_items: Oliver Grant: Complete risk register with latest assessment to the programme office - Due: 22 July 2023
Nisha Iyer: Coordinate change management plan - Due: 22 July 2023

projects.recommendation: Approve the data platform architecture and proceed with vendor selection.
projects.decision: DEFERRED - Decision deferred pending completion of the feasibility study and initial risk assessment. Team to strengthen the business case and re-present at the next steering committee.
action_items: Thomas Edgerton: Present technical architecture diagram for sign-off - Due: 22 July 2023
Thomas Edgerton: Circulate dependency mapping with the platform team - Due: 22 July 2023

projects.recommendation: Engage a specialist security architect to validate the design before Phase 1 commences.
projects.decision: ON HOLD - Phase 1 temporarily placed on hold due to resource conflicts with the ERP programme. A resume decision will be revisited in 8 weeks once capacity is confirmed.
